rationale: Moved glyph delay computation to CSS so animation-delay is derived from --mm-executing-sweep-cycle-duration instead of a hard-coded JS duration.
Automated review summary with no separate actionable request beyond the inline comments.
Removed SHIMMER_DURATION_MS from the component and made glyph delay use the shared CSS sweep duration token.
Removed the hard-coded SWEEP_DIRECTION component constant and introduced the CSS --mm-executing-letter-sweep-direction token alongside the sweep geometry.
Removed will-change from per-glyph spans to avoid unnecessary layer promotion across task lists.
Automated review summary; its actionable points are covered by the inline comment dispositions.
Centralized nested final-state artifact extraction in _pr_resolver_final_payload so status and metadata parsing share the same lookup.
Added _first_stripped_text so headSha selection skips whitespace-only candidates and falls through to valid nested final SHA values, with adapter tests covering the case.
Review summary covered by the same final-payload helper and robust SHA selection changes.
